name: bpmct
html:
bpmct
Software Engineer
Open to opportunities
css: .bpmct-card { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #0d0d0d; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; } .bpmct-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d0d0d 0%, #1a0a2e 50%, #0d0d0d 100%); } .bpmct-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; text-align: center; padding: 8%; width: 100%; } .bpmct-name { font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 6vw, 3rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff0000, #ff7700, #ffff00, #00ff00, #0088ff, #8800ff, #ff0088, #ff0000); background-size: 300% 100%; -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; animation: bpmct-rainbow 2.5s linear infinite; } .bpmct-title { font-size: clamp(0.6rem, 2.5vw, 1.1rem); color: #aaa; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 0.4em; } .bpmct-hire { font-size: clamp(0.55rem, 2vw, 0.9rem); margin-top: 0.6em; padding: 0.3em 0.8em; border-radius: 2em; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff0000, #ff7700, #ffff00, #00ff00, #0088ff, #8800ff, #ff0088, #ff0000); background-size: 300% 100%; animation: bpmct-rainbow 2.5s linear infinite; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; display: inline-block; text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); } .bpmct-rainbow-bar { margin-top: 1em; height: clamp(3px, 1vw, 6px); width: 80%; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff0000, #ff7700, #ffff00, #00ff00, #0088ff, #8800ff, #ff0088, #ff0000); background-size: 300% 100%; animation: bpmct-rainbow 2.5s linear infinite; } @keyframes bpmct-rainbow { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 300% 50%; } }
